title: Syracuse schools to receive $4 million in federal funds for mental health support
summary: Syracuse City School District will receive $4 million in federal funding over four years to expand mental health services by hiring additional school psychologists. This federal grant represents a significant investment in student mental health infrastructure and workforce development within the district.

political_signal.description: Federal funding commitment to mental health support signals alignment with national student wellness priorities and demonstrates investment in youth mental health infrastructure.

processing_notes: Dollar amount validated as $4 million (initial extraction showed only '$4')
